claim_bullets.bullet_text: Might be a simple functional iterator or an iterable object with a .next() method; an iterator is repeatedly called until it reports done. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.224-245)
Possible illustration shown in Figure 1: an image from the source cache. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.224-245)
Iterables look cool, yet examples can make them seem even more impressive. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.224-245)

source_record_text: This chapter explains how iterables and generators work in JavaScript, covering iterator protocols, recursive iteration, state machines, and generator syntax.
